§ 01 How it works
Steps → Coins → Food
01 Walk

Open
the app.

Steps count in the background via phone sensors. No manual tracking, no special equipment.

02 Earn

Steps =
coins.

Progress towards daily and seasonal milestones. Weekly chart like familiar fitness apps.

03 Donate

500 kg
to shelter.

At the end of the month, the platform delivers food to shelter. Guaranteed regardless of audience growth.

§ 03 Live competition engine
Walk. Compete. Help.
Leaderboard

Race
in real
time.

Nationwide leaderboard. See your position every second — and who's leading in Baku.

Groups

Teams and
companies.

Create a private group — friends, colleagues, corporate team. Compete within your circle.

Recognition

Month.
Season.
Year.

Each period brings its own recognition. From daily streaks to annual awards and a publicly verified top.

Habit

Not a campaign—
a habit.

Game mechanics embedded in daily behavior. You return effortlessly, continue without reminders.

§ 04 Season Pass
90 days · ~30 milestones

Season —
90 days.
Join in.

Rolling seasons: join whenever you like — while the season is live. ~30 milestones with reward unlocks. Pro subscription unlocks premium rewards but gives no speed advantage. Impact is fair for everyone.
